info.english_meaning: to serve to please to satisfy
info.hindI_arTa: sevA karanA prasanna honA santuzwa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: jozayejjozatItyete yujAdeH paritarkaRe  prItisevanayorizwaM tudAderjuzate padam ' (Slo. 180 - 181) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na taTEtAni Sakyante sanniyantumasevayA vizayezu prajuzwAni yaTA jYAnena nityaSaH' (manu॰2.96).. prajuzwAni prasaktAni
'upemaM yajYaM pitaro me juzantAm' (aTarva0 18440) upajuzantAmupetya sevantAm
